Class TokenBank

java.lang.Object
Cards.Token.TokenBank
public class TokenBank extends Object
The TokenBank class stores all the token objects on the board in a hashmap

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TokenBank(int numOfPlayers)
    Initializes the number of tokens of each color based on number of players If customTokenMode == 1 in config.properties, set number of tokens based on config.properties

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    add(String color, int amount)
    Adds tokens when tokens are returned to the tokenBank, increases the remaining amount of tokens
    int
    get(String color)
     
    boolean
    hasEnough(String color, int amount)
    Returns true if there are enough tokens in the tokenBank for player to take
    void
    printBank()
    Prints all the remaining amounts of each color token
    void
    remove(String color, int amount)
    Removes tokens when user picks up tokens in their turn, decreases the remaining amount of tokens

  • Constructor Details

    • TokenBank

      public TokenBank(int numOfPlayers)
      Initializes the number of tokens of each color based on number of players If customTokenMode == 1 in config.properties, set number of tokens based on config.properties
      Parameters:
      numOfPlayers - number of players

  • Method Details

    • get

      public int get(String color)

    • add

      public void add(String color, int amount)
      Adds tokens when tokens are returned to the tokenBank, increases the remaining amount of tokens
      Parameters:
      color - color of token
      amount - amount returned to tokenBank

    • hasEnough

      public boolean hasEnough(String color, int amount)
      Returns true if there are enough tokens in the tokenBank for player to take
      Parameters:
      color - color of token
      amount - amount player wants to take
      Returns:
      true if enough tokens, false otherwise

    • remove

      public void remove(String color, int amount)
      Removes tokens when user picks up tokens in their turn, decreases the remaining amount of tokens
      Parameters:
      color - color of token
      amount - amount of tokens user wants to take
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if not enough remaining tokens

    • printBank

      public void printBank()
      Prints all the remaining amounts of each color token
